hero.title: Make smarter decisions for
hero.description: DHARTI AI transforms satellite data, weather patterns, and soil intelligence into actionable decisions. Not forecasts. Decisions.

problem.title: Climate decisions shouldn't be guesswork
problem.description: Every year, unpredictable weather destroys crops worth ₹50,000 crore. Farmers rely on outdated methods. Governments react instead of prevent. The gap between climate data and human decisions is costing lives and livelihoods.

solution.description: DHARTI AI is the intelligence layer between raw climate data and the humans who depend on it. We don't show you the weather — we tell you what to do about it.

yieldFeature.title: Know your harvest before you sow
yieldFeature.description: AI-powered yield estimation that factors in soil health, weather patterns, historical performance, and market signals. Make planting decisions with confidence.

floodFeature.title: 72-hour advance warning that saves lives
floodFeature.description: Real-time river monitoring, catchment analysis, and AI-powered flood probability models. We don't just predict floods — we tell you exactly what to do.

waterFeature.title: Every drop, optimized
waterFeature.description: Precision irrigation scheduling powered by soil moisture sensors, weather forecasts, and crop water demand models. Save water, save money, grow more.

soilFeature.description: Satellite-derived soil health analytics combined with ground-truth sensor data. Monitor nitrogen, phosphorus, potassium, pH, and organic carbon in real-time.

impact.title: Numbers that matter
impact.description: DHARTI AI is already transforming how India farms.

items.question: Is DHARTI AI free for individual farmers?
items.answer: Yes! DHARTI AI is completely free for individual farmers. We believe climate intelligence should be accessible to everyone. Our premium plans are for agricultural organizations and government bodies.

items.question: How accurate are the predictions?
items.answer: Our models achieve 96% accuracy for weather predictions and 87% for yield estimates. We use 140+ data sources including satellite imagery, weather stations, and soil sensors, validated against ground truth data.

items.question: Which crops does DHARTI AI support?
items.answer: We support 14+ crop types including rice, wheat, maize, cotton, sugarcane, soybean, groundnut, mustard, potato, onion, tomato, millet, and pulses. More are being added every month.

items.question: How does the flood warning system work?
items.answer: We monitor river levels, catchment saturation, rainfall patterns, and upstream conditions in real-time. Our AI models provide 72-hour advance flood warnings — typically 3 days before official government alerts.

items.question: Is my farm data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We follow SOC 2 Type II security standards. Your farm data is never shared with third parties without your explicit consent.

items.question: What languages are supported?
items.answer: Currently we support English and Hindi. We're actively developing support for Marathi, Gujarati, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, and Bengali — launching Q4 2026.

cta.title: Ready to make climate-confident decisions?
